name: dlt-proof-writing-marketplace
description: DLT (Deep Learning Theory) Proof Writing Skill — an Agent Skill for rigorous, modular LaTeX proof drafting in deep learning theory, statistical learning, optimization, and RL theory.
author: Chiwun Yang

skills.name: dlt-proof-writing
skills.description: Write rigorous, modular mathematical proofs in LaTeX for deep-learning-theory papers. Enforces a four-phase workflow (plan with Socratic intake → preliminaries → statements/proofs → confidence sweep → five-reviewer scored panel), display-math derivations (lint R19), reference honesty, Occam's razor, and one-section-per-`.tex`-file project structure. Validated against 5 representative proofs (Hoeffding, NTK convergence, VC generalization, Linear MDP UCB regret, Sobolev minimax lower bound).
